title: fix: payment.rs change address diversifier gap
description: send_payment calls next_diversifier then passes the index to build_shielded_tx which calls find_address internally. find_address may skip invalid diversifiers, leaving a gap that causes the next payment to re-allocate the same change address — violating ZIP-316 shielded unlinkability. Fix: call find_address after next_diversifier and advance_diversifier_to past the actual index before calling build_shielded_tx.
